title: Garlicky Broccoli Gratin
description: A delicious and easy-to-make gratin dish loaded with garlicky flavor and tender broccoli.
instructions: Steam the broccoli until tender, about 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, melt the garlicky butter over medium heat.
Add the steamed broccoli to the pan and toss to coat with butter.
Transfer the broccoli mixture to a baking dish.
Sprinkle the dutch cheese and gratin on top of the broccoli.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.
